svg.title: VERA-cloud provider-triggered iOS call flow
svg.desc: A provider clicks start in a web console; the VERA API creates a session and sends a VoIP push via Apple's APNs; the iPhone app rings via CallKit; when the patient answers, the app opens the existing WebSocket audio endpoint and runs the existing Azure Speech and dialog/flagging engine, routing concerns to the care team.
svg.text: The same /ws/audio session and dialog/flagging engine already serve the web frontend and Telegram bot.
For the iOS beta you add: device-token registration, a provider “start check-in” endpoint, the APNs push, and the app itself.
